# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (request.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed. Use POST.' }), {
      status: 405,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  try {
    const body = await request.json();

    const { content, headers: userHeaders, chunkSize = 100, delayMs = 50 } = body as {
      content?: string;
      headers?: Record<string, string>;
      chunkSize?: number;
      delayMs?: number;
    };

    if (!content) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing "content" field in request body.' }), {
        status: 400,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      });
    }

    const encoder = new TextEncoder();
    const contentString = typeof content === 'string' ? content : JSON.stringify(content);

    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        try {
          let offset = 0;
          while (offset < contentString.length) {
            const chunk = contentString.slice(offset, offset + chunkSize);
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
            offset += chunkSize;

            if (delayMs > 0 && offset < contentString.length) {
              await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, delayMs));
            }
          }
          controller.close();
        } catch (err) {
          controller.error(err);
        }
      },
    });

    const responseHeaders = new Headers({
      'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
      'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate',
      'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked',
      'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
    });

    if (userHeaders && typeof userHeaders === 'object') {
      const disallowedHeaders = new Set([
        'transfer-encoding',
        'connection',
        'keep-alive',
        'host',
      ]);

      for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(userHeaders)) {
        if (
          typeof key === 'string' &&
          typeof value === 'string' &&
          !disallowedHeaders.has(key.toLowerCase())
        ) {
          responseHeaders.set(key, value);
        }
      }
    }

    return new Response(stream, {
      status: 200,
      headers: responseHeaders,
    });
  } catch (err) {
    const errorMessage = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error occurred';
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Failed to process request.', details: errorMessage }),
      {
        status: 500,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }
}
